description_long: This is a modern duplex house with a boxy, geometric design, featuring two attached units separated by a central dividing wall. The exterior is characterized by a stark contrast of black and white surfaces, with flat roofs and clean, angular lines. Each unit has a private driveway and a small front yard, while the rear side opens to a rectangular green backyard. The windows are arranged in a staggered, asymmetrical pattern, with prominent black frames and some projecting window bays. The entryways are recessed, providing a sheltered approach, and the overall structure sits within a low boundary wall. The design emphasizes minimalism and functionality, with a focus on privacy and efficient use of space.
description: A modern, boxy duplex house with black and white exterior, flat roofs, and asymmetrical windows, featuring private driveways and green backyards.
description_view_0: Front view showing two recessed entryways, driveways, and the main black-and-white facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roofs, and the depth of the driveways and backyards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two green backyards and the back facade with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mirrored layout and the length of the house, with visible driveways and backyards.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with steps, minimal overhang, and no decorative columns
